memberdef.definition: using Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::ListContainer = typename std::list<T*>
memberdef.name: ListContainer

memberdef.definition: using Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::Iterator = typename ListContainer::iterator
memberdef.name: Iterator

memberdef.definition: using Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::ConstIterator = typename ListContainer::const_iterator
memberdef.name: ConstIterator

memberdef.type: typename std::unordered_map< const T *, Iterator, Hash, KeyEqual >
memberdef.definition: using Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::MapContainer = typename std::unordered_map<const T*, Iterator, Hash, KeyEqual>
memberdef.name: MapContainer

memberdef.definition: using Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::SizeType = std::size_t
memberdef.name: SizeType

memberdef.definition: MapContainer Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::mMap
memberdef.name: mMap

briefdescription.para: Helper cache map to find item fast.

memberdef.definition: ListContainer Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::mList
memberdef.name: mList

briefdescription.para: Ordered by PushBack API called. Actual ownership will be stored here.

memberdef.definition: Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::OrderedSet
memberdef.name: OrderedSet

memberdef.definition: Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::OrderedSet
memberdef.name: OrderedSet

memberdef.definition: OrderedSet & Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::operator=
memberdef.name: operator=

memberdef.definition: Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::~OrderedSet
memberdef.name: ~OrderedSet

memberdef.definition: Iterator Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::Begin
memberdef.name: Begin

memberdef.definition: Iterator Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::End
memberdef.name: End

memberdef.definition: ConstIterator Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::Begin
memberdef.name: Begin

memberdef.definition: ConstIterator Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::End
memberdef.name: End

memberdef.definition: Iterator Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::begin
memberdef.name: begin

memberdef.definition: Iterator Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::end
memberdef.name: end

memberdef.definition: ConstIterator Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::begin
memberdef.name: begin

memberdef.definition: ConstIterator Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::end
memberdef.name: end

memberdef.definition: SizeType Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::Count
memberdef.name: Count

simplesect.para: The number of elements that this container owned.

memberdef.definition: bool Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::IsEmpty
memberdef.name: IsEmpty

briefdescription.para: Predicate to determine if the container is empty.

simplesect.para: true if the container is empty

memberdef.definition: void Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::Reserve
memberdef.name: Reserve

briefdescription.para: Reserves space in the ordered set.

memberdef.definition: Iterator Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::Find
memberdef.name: Find

briefdescription.para: Find and get iterator of object. If not exist, return End().

parameterdescription.para: The object pointer what we want to find.

memberdef.definition: ConstIterator Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::Find
memberdef.name: Find

memberdef.definition: void Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::PushBack
memberdef.name: PushBack

briefdescription.para: PushBack and keep ownership of object.

simplesect.para: Iterator will keep order of PushBack API call.

parameterdescription.para: The object pointer what we want to insert.

memberdef.definition: void Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::EraseObject
memberdef.name: EraseObject

briefdescription.para: Erase and remove memory of object.

parameterdescription.para: The object pointer what we want to erase.

memberdef.definition: void Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::EraseObject
memberdef.name: EraseObject

memberdef.definition: Iterator Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::Erase
memberdef.name: Erase

briefdescription.para: Erase and remove memory of object by iterator.

parameterdescription.para: The iterator what we want to erase.

memberdef.definition: ConstIterator Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::Erase
memberdef.name: Erase

memberdef.definition: T * Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::Release
memberdef.name: Release

briefdescription.para: Release and move ownership of object. This API do not remove memory.

simplesect.para: iterators are invalidated by this method.

parameterdescription.para: The iterator what we want to release.

memberdef.definition: T * Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::Release
memberdef.name: Release

memberdef.definition: void Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::Clear
memberdef.name: Clear

briefdescription.para: Remove all data and release memory if we owned data.

memberdef.definition: void Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::ReorderCacheMap
memberdef.name: ReorderCacheMap

briefdescription.para: Reorder cache map. It should be called after the value of mList changed.

memberdef.definition: Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::OrderedSet
memberdef.name: OrderedSet

memberdef.definition: OrderedSet & Dali::Integration::OrderedSet< T, owned, Hash, KeyEqual >::operator=
memberdef.name: operator=

briefdescription.para: Container of data which has strong point to Find & Erase. It will be useful when we need to iterate the order of data insertion. and need to check whether some object is exist or not very fast.

simplesect.para: Since the data's memory is not continuos, iteration is slower than normal vector contianer.
Currently, we only support to hold pointer type data.

parameterdescription.para: True if data is owned, So we will automatcally release the memory False if data is not owned by this set. Default as true.
Custom hash function of const T* type for MapContainer. Note that if two const T* return true at KeyEqual, Hash should return same value. Default as std::hash<const T*>
Custom equal function of const T* type for MapContainer. Return true if two const T* type is equal. Default as std::equal_to<const T*>
